narrative:
Bloom Twp township has 7,924 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
